name: fleet-refresh-0-19-3
title: Roll out sd-ai-command-pack 0.19.4 to the fleet
description: Refresh every stale registered consumer to the corrected pack release 0.19.4 after integration review stopped the original 0.19.3 rollout.
creator: sdelmas
notes: The rollout began at 0.19.3. Loadsmith PR #90 surfaced a pack-owned file-path resolution defect in sd-status, so the rollout stopped and moved to corrective release 0.19.4. Source PR #154 merged the correction, then its squash merge exposed a main-push guard assumption that only two-parent PR merges were sanctioned; the guard recovery is tracked in this task before tagging or consumer rollout resumes.
